columns.name: event_date
columns.description: Date and time of the event in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS).

columns.name: event_name
columns.description: Name of the event attended.

columns.name: member_first_name
columns.description: First name of the member who attended the event.

columns.name: member_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the member who attended the event.

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Total allocated budget amount.

columns.name: category
columns.description: Budget category (e.g., Food).

columns.description: Date and time of the event in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS).

columns.name: event_name
columns.description: Name of the event associated with the budget.

columns.name: event_status
columns.description: Status of the event (e.g., Closed).

columns.name: remaining
columns.description: Remaining budget amount after spending.

columns.name: spent
columns.description: Amount spent in the budget category.

columns.name: event_date
columns.description: Date and time of the event in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS).

columns.name: event_name
columns.description: Name of the event.

columns.name: location
columns.description: Location where the event is held.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Additional notes about the event, if any.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Status of the event (e.g., Open).

columns.name: type
columns.description: Type of event (e.g., Meeting).

columns.name: approved
columns.description: Approval status of the expense (true or false).

columns.name: budget_category
columns.description: Budget category associated with the expense (e.g., Food).

columns.name: cost
columns.description: Cost of the expense.

columns.name: expense_date
columns.description: Date of the expense in YYYY-MM-DD format.

columns.name: expense_description
columns.description: Description of the expense (e.g., Pizza).

columns.name: member_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the member who incurred the expense.

columns.description: Amount of income received.

columns.description: Date the income was received in YYYY-MM-DD format.

columns.name: member_first_name
columns.description: First name of the member who contributed the income.

columns.name: member_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the member who contributed the income.

columns.name: source
columns.description: Source of the income (e.g., Dues).

columns.description: Name of the college housing the department.

columns.description: Email address of the club member.
